basics.description: **XdrLogRaider** — Microsoft Sentinel Solution ingesting Defender XDR portal-only telemetry (configuration, compliance, drift, exposure, governance) via PowerShell Azure Function App. 52 streams across 7 tiers. After this deploy, run the setup helper from the repo to upload auth secrets to Key Vault.

validations.message: You must have contributor access to deploy.

basics.name: projectPrefix
basics.label: Project prefix
basics.toolTip: 3-12 alphanumeric characters. Used as a prefix for all created resource names.

basics.name: env
basics.label: Environment
basics.toolTip: Environment tag used in resource names and tags.

options.text: Before deploying, create a dedicated read-only Entra service account (Security Reader + MDE analyst read roles) in your tenant. You'll upload this account's credentials to Key Vault AFTER deployment. Never use a privileged or human account.

subLabel.preValidation: Configure how the connector authenticates to security.microsoft.com

elements.name: serviceAccountUpn
elements.label: Service account UPN
elements.toolTip: The UPN of the dedicated service account the connector authenticates as. e.g. svc-xdrlr@contoso.onmicrosoft.com

elements.name: authMethod
elements.label: Auth method
elements.toolTip: How the connector authenticates. Both unattended, auto-refreshing. Passkey is stronger against modern CA.

options.text: After deployment, secrets are NOT yet in Key Vault. Run `./tools/Initialize-XdrLogRaiderAuth.ps1 -KeyVaultName <name>` from the cloned repo to upload them. The deployment output contains the exact command.

elements.name: existingWorkspaceId
elements.label: Existing workspace resource ID (optional)
elements.toolTip: Full resource ID of an existing Log Analytics workspace. Leave blank to create a new one. Sentinel-enabled workspaces recommended.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid workspace resource ID or blank

elements.name: functionPlanSku
elements.label: Function App plan
elements.toolTip: Y1 (Consumption) is recommended — fits within Azure Functions free tier for typical workloads.

elements.name: functionAppZipVersion
elements.label: Function App version
elements.toolTip: Version tag to deploy. 'latest' pulls the newest GitHub release; or specify vX.Y.Z to pin.
